headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://apis.google.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.googleusercontent.com https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com wss://*.firebaseio.com https://*.firebaseapp.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.google.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
